title: Operator creates a shadow automation policy
steps: Pick an actionKind candidate from recent assistant action queue history.
Create shadow policy and record a shadow run against a human decision.
expected: AssistantAutomationPolicy persists in SHADOW status with readiness score and guardrails.
AssistantAutomationShadowRun records predicted status, human status, match/mismatch, and payload preview.
No real action is executed automatically.

title: Enablement is blocked until guardrails pass
steps: Attempt to enable a candidate with failed release gate, weak evidence, or insufficient shadow matches.
Review failed guardrail chips in the candidate card.
Resolve evidence/release-gate/shadow issues and try again.
expected: API returns conflict when any guardrail blocks enablement.
Policy remains SHADOW or PAUSED rather than silently enabling.
Guardrails clearly explain the reason for blocking.

title: Operator pauses controlled automation and follows rollback plan
steps: Open a policy candidate with a saved policy.
Review rollback plan and shadow journal before re-enabling.
expected: Policy status changes to PAUSED and stores pausedAt.
Rollback plan instructs returning work to human action queue and reviewing recent runs.
Audit event records the policy state change.
